ideas.title: Monday Morning Delegation Script (Copy-Paste This)
ideas.solution: Twitter thread with exact copy-paste delegation scripts for Monday morning
ideas.angle: Radical transparency - show the exact text I sent to my team
ideas.validation: Reddit r/startups delegation threads get 500+ upvotes, Monday engagement spikes

ideas.title: The 5-Minute Setup That Saved Me $2K/Month in Support Costs
ideas.solution: Tutorial showing a simple AI auto-responder setup with actual ROI calculation
ideas.angle: Not buy expensive tools but use what you have better
ideas.validation: Twitter #bootstrapped community questions, support cost threads

ideas.title: We Deleted Our Sales Team. Here's What Happened.
ideas.problem: Competitor positioning shifts, sales-focused vs support-focused
ideas.solution: LinkedIn post + case study of moving from sales-led to product-led motion
ideas.angle: Counter-intuitive positioning - sales team hurt our growth
ideas.validation: Competitor weakness: spammy feel mentioned 12 times, PLG trending

ideas.title: Remote Work Rituals: What Actually Works (Data from 50 Teams)
ideas.solution: Reddit-style post aggregating rituals from 50 remote teams with engagement stats
ideas.angle: Crowdsourced data - not just my opinion, but what 50 teams actually do
ideas.validation: LinkedIn remote work posts get 300+ likes, Reddit r/remote_work active

ideas.title: Product Hunt Launch: Why We Came in #12 (And Why It Was Better Than #1)
ideas.solution: Honest post-mortem of a failed launch that actually drove better customers
ideas.angle: Vulnerability + data - show conversion rates, not just rankings
ideas.validation: #indiehackers community loves honest launch stories, Product Hunt discussions

ideas.title: I Charged $5 Instead of $49. Here's The Chaos That Ensued
ideas.solution: Twitter thread documenting a pricing experiment gone wrong and the lessons
ideas.angle: Here's what NOT to do - failure stories engage more than success stories
ideas.validation: Reddit pricing experiment threads, pricing too complex complaints

ideas.title: Onboarding Email Sequence: The 5 Emails That Convert 40% of Trials
ideas.solution: Full email sequence copy with subject lines, open rates, click rates
ideas.angle: Steal these emails - complete transparency, not here's a framework
ideas.validation: CS community loves templates, onboarding threads get high engagement

ideas.title: The Notion or Excel Decision Framework
ideas.solution: Simple flowchart decision framework for when to use which tool
ideas.angle: Stop debating, use this framework - reduce tool switching chaos
ideas.validation: #buildinpublic tool discussions, too many tools complaints

ideas.title: Customer Support: The One Metric That Predicts Churn (It's Not CSAT)
ideas.solution: LinkedIn post revealing an unconventional churn prediction metric
ideas.angle: Controversial take - CSAT is a vanity metric with data to prove it
ideas.validation: Twitter CS discussions, churn prediction threads get engagement

ideas.title: Mobile App: Why We Killed 3 Features and Usage Went UP
ideas.problem: Too many features, Mobile app sucks
ideas.solution: Case study showing feature removal led to higher engagement
ideas.angle: Less is more with before/after usage data
ideas.validation: App store reviews complain about complexity, PM community discussions

ideas.title: Founder Depression: The Number Nobody Talks About
ideas.solution: Vulnerable LinkedIn post sharing personal struggle + what helped
ideas.angle: I'm not broken, I'm burned out - normalize the conversation
ideas.validation: Reddit mental health threads go viral, LinkedIn founder vulnerability performs

ideas.title: Integration Documentation: The 3-Page Template Customers Actually Read
ideas.problem: Can't find what I need, Integration issues
ideas.solution: Show before/after documentation with readability scores
ideas.angle: Stop writing War and Peace, write what people read
ideas.validation: Developer community complaints, support forum volume

ideas.title: AI Hype Alert: 3 Features We Didn't Build (And Why)
ideas.solution: Opinion piece on saying NO to AI features
ideas.angle: We built features that work, not features that trend
ideas.validation: AI skepticism in #buildinpublic, fatigue conversations emerging

ideas.title: The 15-Minute Daily Ritual That Saved My Marriage (And My Company)
ideas.solution: Personal story about a simple boundary ritual
ideas.angle: Vulnerability + specific action (not take time off)
ideas.validation: Monday mental health spikes, Reddit founder stories perform

ideas.title: Competitor Changed Pricing. We Changed This Instead.
ideas.solution: LinkedIn post showing alternative to price wars (value props, positioning)
ideas.angle: Don't compete on price, compete on clarity
ideas.validation: Competitor pricing weakness (15+ complaints/week), positioning discussions
